title: sphaenolobium tianschanicum
intro: Sphaenolobium tianschanicum is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Boraginaceae family, commonly known as a type of forget-me-not. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Sphaenolobium tianschanicum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
